sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q²M MF Applicator EVO 2 pieces

SKU: Q2MMFAPP

- Application pad for care products, wax, cleaners, coatings, and more
- 2-pack in a reusable bag
- Safely holds on two or three fingers
- Washable and reusable

Category: Applikator, Microfiber

Price: 14,00 € (7,00 € per 1 Unit) incl. 19% VAT, plus shipping costs

Availability: Already re-ordered

Description:
The Gyeon Q²M Microfiber Applicator EVO has been designed to accelerate the coating process and enable uniform application on all types and sizes of components, no matter how hard-to-reach or complex the surface is.

It is versatile and suitable for use with coatings, dressings, gels, or waxes.

High-quality microfibers wrapped around a soft sponge ensure a perfect fit to the shape of the surface to be coated, regardless of the material, such as paint, trims, glass, leather, gelcoat, or marine wood.

The grip pocket on the top provides a secure hold and enhances functionality.

sources.page_title: GYEON Q²M MF Applicator 2-pack – Zachte microvezel pads | Carclean.com
sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M MF Applicator EVO 2-pack

Merk: GYEON
Art. nr.: GYMFAPEVO
Beoordeling: 5.0 (3)

Prijs: € 14,99
Beschikbaarheid: Op voorraad

- Microvezel applicators voor het aanbrengen van coatings
- Verbeterde stof
- Geschikt voor lak, trims, leer, gelcoat en hout
- Bevat 2 Q²M MF Applicators

Beschrijving:
Veilige en zachte microvezel applicator pads

Met de perfecte maat en ergonomische vorm kun je snel en gelijkmatig coatings, sealants of trim-/lederconditioners aanbrengen. Ontworpen voor gebruik op alle oppervlakken: autolak, gelcoat, trim, velgen, leer, metaal of hout. Q²M MF Applicator EVO heeft een verbeterde stof die zorgt voor een luxueus gevoel en moeiteloos gebruik.

Maak kennis met de ultieme partner voor het aanbrengen van je favoriete producten!

Met de Q²M MF Applicators krijg je de perfecte tools in handen om je voertuig te laten stralen. Deze applicatorpads zullen je helpen om snel en gemakkelijk de gewenste producten aan te brengen. De zachte en veilige microvezel zorgt ervoor dat je oppervlakken worden beschermd terwijl je een gelijkmatige en professionele afwerking bereikt.

De veelzijdigheid van deze pads is ongeëvenaard. Of je nu je auto, boot, motor of andere waardevolle bezittingen wilt behandelen, de Q²M MF Applicator pads zijn geschikt voor alle oppervlakken. Laat je creativiteit de vrije loop en breng moeiteloos coatings, sealants of conditioners aan op elke gewenste plek. Voor het beste resultaat bij het aanbrengen van lakcoating, kun je vertrouwen op de Q²M CoatingApplicator.

Specificaties:
Artikelnummer: GYMFAPEVO
Formaat: 120 x 95 x 25 mm
2-pack

Reviews (3 beoordelingen, 5.0 gemiddeld):

Top product - Zit heel fijn in de hand, kan ook in kleine hoekjes komen. Heel handig
Kevin - 03/10/2025

gemakkelijk - de Q²M MF Applicator past perfect in mijn hand en is zeer gemakkelijk te gebruiken om de Q² TRIM EVO precies aan te brengen en de trims te volgen zonder de lak aan te raken.
Claude - 03/10/2025

Fijne applicator - Gebruik bijna alles naar tevredenheid van Gyeon. Dus ook voor deze applicator gekozen. Omdat ik een auto met wat hoger dak heb. Werkt dat met deze applicator wat makkelijker omdat je je hand vlak kan houden en toch een goede grip hebt.
MB - 18/12/2024

sources.page_title: Gyeon MF Applicator - 2 pack - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon MF Applicator - 2 pack

Price: $15.99
Quantity Discount: 2+ units at $14.99 (6% savings)

Available Sizes: 2 pack

Product Information:
- Great coating applicator!
- Foam core wrapped in microfiber
- Comes in a 2 pack!
- Product Code: GY-6001

Product Description:
The Gyeon MF Applicator is a top-notch applicator to help you apply your Gyeon coatings or virtually any other coating! When applying a coating, it is important to keep the application as thin as possible to avoid streaking and excessive removal. If you do not have a good applicator, you can be left with an uneven application or worse, your applicator can soak up and waste lots of expensive product. The Gyeon MF Applicator is made of a high-quality microfiber that is wrapped around a soft sponge. This ensures perfect adjustment to the shape of the car, allowing you to provide a nice, thin and even application every time. The pocket on the top side fits your fingers, which provides a great grip and easy maneuverability. Best yet, these come in a two pack so you will always have an extra on hand! If you are looking for a high-quality applicator, the Gyeon MF Applicator is one to keep in your detailing repertoire!

From The Label - Product Description:
Safe and soft microfibre coating applicator pads. Perfect size and ergonomic shape allow quick and even coating application. Designed for use on all surfaces: automotive and marine paint, gelcoat, trim, rims, leather, metal or wood.

When used with paint coatings, the applicator may only be used once.

Customer Reviews:
100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 2 ratings)

Reviewed by Frank P. on 11/1/2020 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Expensive but well worth the price. I will always use these applicators.

Reviewed by Edward R. on 8/17/2019 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
The best applicator for ceramics coating. Very soft. Easy to apply BUT need to be disposed after. Otherwise they will be crystalized

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M MF Applicators - Premium Microfibre Applicator Pads — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M MF Applicators

Brand: Gyeon
Price: £10.50
Availability: 18 in stock, ready to be shipped

We Say:
Gyeon Q²M MF Applicators feature a soft, dense, 80:20 (polyester:polyamide) microfibre weave and a finger pocket. The uniform nature of this weave enables thin and even product application on almost all automotive surfaces, making Gyeon Q²M MF Applicators perfect for a variety of detailing duties. The finger pocket is a neat addition that improves their comfort and performance further, and helps to prevent them from being accidentally dropped during use.

Key Features:
Diameter/Length: 128 mm (Approximate Value)
Flexibility: 8/10 (Compared To Others)
Washable: Yes (Hand Or Machine)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M MF Applicators are designed to speed up the quartz coating application process and facilitate perfectly even coverage on all automotive surfaces, both inside and out. A high quality microfibre outer wrapped around a soft sponge core ensures perfect adjustment to the shape of the work area, while the pocket on the top provides added comfort and security. When used with quartz coatings, Gyeon Q²M MF Applicators should be discarded after use.

Specification:
Construction: 80% polyester, 20% polyamide (colour may vary)
Flexibility: 8
Size: Pack of 2
Washable: Yes (hand or machine)

How To Use:
Discard after use (if used to apply a quartz coating) or else: (i) wash in a washing machine at a low temperature (40°C) using a non-biological liquid detergent (avoid soap powders and detergents containing bleach or fabric softeners); (ii) allow to dry naturally on a line or tumble dry on a cool heat setting (avoid radiators and other sources of high heat), and; (iii) store in a dry, dust-free environment while not in use (lidded plastic storage boxes are ideal in this respect).

Image:
https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-mf-applicators_1119x1119.jpg

GYEON Q²M MF Applicator EVO 2 Pack

Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

The Q²M MF Applicator is a highly demanded aid for coating application on large, hardly accessible or complex shaped surfaces. Is it paint, leather, trim, gelcoat or marine wood, the high quality microfibre applicator will allow an even and smooth surface coverage. The ergonomic shape improves grip and prevents the applicator from falling on the ground.

BOX CONTAINS: 2 MF APPLICATORS

AVAILABLE SIZES: 120X95X25 MM

SOFT AND ERGONOMIC
The new Q²M MF Applicator has been designed to speed up the coating process and allow perfectly even coverage on all types of large or complex panels. High quality microfibre wrapped around a soft sponge ensures perfect adjustment to the shape of the coated area. The pocket on the top side provides great grip and increases functionality. The applicator is offered as a 2-pack.
